title: sim/chaos.py apply() methods missing return type annotations
description:
Nine `apply()` methods in `src/lichen/sim/chaos.py` are missing return type annotations (all return `RxCandidate | None`):

- Line 45: `JammerEffect.apply()`
- Line 87: `DropEffect.apply()`
- Line 133: `CorruptEffect.apply()`
- Line 177: `DelayEffect.apply()`
- Line 207: `RssiOffsetEffect.apply()`
- Line 245: `SnrOffsetEffect.apply()`
- Line 298: `PacketLossEffect.apply()`
- Line 348: `BitErrorEffect.apply()`
- Line 416: `ChaosEngine.apply_all()`
